title: The Tool Tax: How Complex Software Quietly Kills Creativity
description: The more powerful our tools become, the more they cost us in something we don't measure: the slow, frustrating, essential work of learning.

title: BetterTouchTool Just Got a Launcher — And It's Giving Raycast a Run for Its Money
description: I've been a Raycast loyalist for years. Then BetterTouchTool 6.493 shipped a full SwiftUI launcher, and in one weekend I rebuilt three plugins that outperformed what I had in Raycast.
